insight: ChatControl's Discord integration requires the DiscordSRV plugin. Users must disable DiscordSRV's built-in chat relay by setting `DiscordChatChannelMinecraftToDiscord: false` in DiscordSRV's `config.yml`, otherwise messages get duplicated. ChatControl checks this on startup and logs a warning if it's still enabled (see ChatControl.java line ~247).

The `@prolong` annotation in rule replacements (`then replace @prolong *`) duplicates a character to match the length of the matched text. It supports group-specific length matching with `@prolong:N` syntax (e.g., `@prolong:1 *` matches group 1's length). Implementation is in Foundation's `RuleTextReplacer.replaceWithProlong()`. If the group index is invalid or out of range, it silently falls back to the full match length (group 0).
